CustomField.description: ARR band bucketing ARR__c (or Amount when ARR__c is null). Maintained by OpportunityTriggerHandler — stamped in before-save Apex right after ARR__c is recalculated, so the band always matches the saved ARR__c; recomputed every save, so manual edits are overwritten. Backed by the Northstar_ARR_Band restricted global value set; thresholds: <50K, 50K–250K, 250K–1M, 1M+.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Annual recurring revenue band (auto-calculated from ARR, or Amount when ARR is empty). Do not edit manually — the Opportunity revenue trigger resets it on every save.
CustomField.label: ARR Band
